Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: As you place more buoys, the solution on the contact becomes more and more sure until eventually the contact is fully identified. You can tell when a contact is fully identified when the type of submarine is shown.
This contact looks like a Soviet November class attack submarine!

Note: enemy vessels will shoot back at you in this tutorial if they can. The November class carries the 53-65K wake-homing torpedo with 10 nautical mile range. If this torpedo crosses one of your ships' wakes, it will home in and sink you! You can avoid this by reducing speed to All Stop once WH torpedoes are detected, or by altering course so the wake-homers cross ahead of you and don't pick up your wake.
